title: Skyline
_case: 6 — wash/sybil: 24 replays of one track in <1h; the per-hour cap lets the genuine early plays through, then the agent rejects the excess as wash-listening

title: Bach: Goldberg Variations, Aria
_case: 1 — public-domain classical: Bach has no living rightsholder, so the composition share is reassigned to the performer Glenn Gould

title: Creep (Live at Glastonbury) [Audience Recording]
_case: 2 — live bootleg: low confidence + unregistered performer -> escrow, flagged for review

title: NOW 50 - Track 07
_case: 3 — compilation: recover the real artist (Dua Lipa + writers + producer) behind the 'Various Artists' label

title: Midnight (Solour Remix)
_case: 4 — remix lineage: 50% to remixer Solour (registered, paid) + 50% to the original Maya Lin Trio / J. Halloran (unregistered -> partial escrow)

title: hey jude
_case: 5 — typo / no mbid: fuzzy-resolve 'beatles hey jude' -> canonical 'The Beatles — Hey Jude'

title: Horizon
_case: 7 — skip: only 12s heard (< 30s floor) -> rejected, not a real listen

title: Dawn Chorus
_case: 8 — long-tail no wallet: real mbid but no registered wallet -> escrowed against an ERC-8004 identity, claimable later

title: Open Road
_case: 9 — clean multi-credit: performer + 2 writers + producer -> role-weighted 4-way split, fully settled
